list.title: Pages
list.description: Manage both MDX-backed pages and custom HTML pages rendered inside the landing layout.

add.title: Add HTML Page
add.description: Create a custom HTML page that keeps the landing layout and renders your pasted or uploaded HTML code.

edit.title: Edit HTML Page
edit.description: Update the route, metadata, and rendered HTML for this custom page.

labels.title: Title
labels.upload_hint: Select a local .html file to load its code into the editor.

cards.details_description: This page is stored in the database and rendered with the public landing layout.
cards.history_description: Each save creates a full snapshot you can restore later.

messages.invalid_slug: Route path can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and slashes
messages.reserved_slug: That route path is reserved by an existing page or system route

delete.title: Delete HTML Page
delete.description: Remove this custom HTML page from the database.

messages.confirm: This action will remove the custom HTML page and its sitemap entry.
messages.only_custom_html: This only applies to database HTML pages. MDX-backed pages cannot be deleted here.

edit.title: Edit Page Override
edit.description: The form starts from the current page content. Matching the MDX file value will automatically fall back to the file instead of storing a duplicate override.

cards.source_description: These values come from the checked-in MDX file.
cards.override_description: Only values different from the MDX file will be saved to the database.
